title: Type Casting
description: Safely convert a double to an int using the as operator or methods.
problemStatement:
Sometimes you need to convert types. Create a `double pi = 3.14159;`. Convert it to an integer using the `.toInt()` method and print the result.

**Expected Output:** `3`.
hints: In Dart, you can't just cast double to int with `(int)`. You use the method call.
